latest_news.headline: US Marines (31st MEU) deploying to seize strategic islands in Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: 2,200-2,500 US Marines from 31st MEU arriving next week. Planned to seize Kharg and Qeshm islands to reopen Hormuz shipping. Reuters: Pentagon discussing additional reinforcements beyond MEU. War entering 'new phase' focused on Hormuz.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu says war will end 'a lot faster than people think'
latest_news.text: Netanyahu projects confidence on war timeline. US Energy Secretary previously said war would end 'in next few weeks.' Pentagon says no fixed timeline.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

top_signals: Netanyahu: Israel acted alone on South Pars/Asaluyeh, complying with Trump halt on energy strikes
Lebanon: 1,001 killed (40 healthcare workers, 118 children), UN may classify as war crimes
Iran FM Araghchi: 'ZERO restraint' warning if energy infrastructure struck again
Israel begins striking northern Iran — geographic expansion of campaign
Gabbard accused of altering Senate testimony to hide intel contradicting Iran threat narrative
Kremlin: Ukraine peace talks on 'situational pause'; Zelensky expects weekend discussions
QatarEnergy: 17% global LNG capacity cut for up to 5 years
Brent crude ~$114 (peaked $119) — up 60%+ since war began
Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23, TTP also trucing
Mojtaba Khamenei consolidates power, vows retaliation for 3 senior assassinations

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 20 Hour 02. Key developments: Netanyahu press conference — Israel complies with Trump energy strike halt. Lebanon death toll crosses 1,000 with 40 healthcare workers killed. Israel expands to northern Iran strikes. Gabbard testimony controversy. Mojtaba Khamenei consolidating power. All existing signals remain stable. No de-escalation signals. Pakistan ceasefire holding through Mar 23.

latest_news.headline: Iran launches multiple missile volleys at Israel after Netanyahu declares Iran 'decimated'
latest_news.text: Iran fires multiple rounds of missiles toward Israel late Thursday after Netanyahu said Islamic Republic has been 'decimated' by war. Missiles intercepted by Iron Dome/Arrow. Continues pattern of Iranian retaliation.

latest_news.headline: 31st MEU Marines (2,200 troops) deploying to seize Kharg and Qeshm islands in Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: US Marines from 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit confirmed deploying to seize strategic islands in Strait of Hormuz. Pentagon weighing additional reinforcements beyond MEU. War entering 'new phase' focused on Hormuz reopening.

latest_news.headline: Trump: 'I won't put boots on the ground in Iran'
latest_news.text: Trump rules out ground invasion but adds 'if I was I wouldn't tell you.' Contradicts Pentagon Marine deployment narrative. No troops commitment despite Hormuz operation.

latest_news.headline: Qatar warns energy exports may take 'years to recover' from strikes
latest_news.text: QatarEnergy says exports may take years to recover even from current damage. 17% global LNG capacity cut confirmed. Force majeure on long-term contracts continues.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 03:04 CET) — Hourly scan: (1) Iran retaliated with multiple missile volleys at Israel overnight after Netanyahu declared Iran 'decimated'. (2) 31st MEU (2,200 Marines) confirmed deploying to seize Kharg/Qeshm islands in Hormuz — new signal added. (3) Trump: 'won't put boots on ground' but won't confirm if already there. (4) UK+5 nations ready for Hormuz safe passage ops. (5) Qatar warns energy exports may take years to recover. (6) DOJ seizes 4 Iranian hacking domains. (7) Netanyahu press conference aftermath — Israel complied with Trump halt on energy strikes. No new conflict zones. Status quo maintained at critical/imminent levels.
